items.title: O'Brien POTD Willis Reed. Grambling C was the Captain & NY legend for his heroics in the 70 Finals MVP (also reg MVP). Super strong & tough ("most man I ever met in my life"). 70-71 (age 28) was his last year as a star cuz injuries wore him down & retired by 75. RIP.

items.body_excerpt: O'Brien POTD Willis Reed. Grambling C was the Captain & NY legend for his heroics in the 70 Finals MVP (also reg MVP). Super strong & tough ("most man I ever met in my life"). 70-71 (age 28) was his last year as a star cuz injuries wore him down & retired by 75. RIP.

items.title: There is some devastating news from the college sports world to share at this late hour: Longtime Louisville SID Kenny Klein, who "retired" in 2022 but never left the scene in the years since, has died at 65.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
There is some devastating news from the college sports world to share at this late hour: Longtime Louisville SID Kenny Klein, who "retired" in 2022 but never left the scene in the years since, has died at 65.

There isn't a more respected person in the college sports space. Not one. A tragedy.

media.title: Kenny Klein, former longtime Louisville Athletics administrator, dies
media.description: Kenny Klein, a former Louisville Athletics administrator of 39 years who worked more than 1,300 straight men's basketball games, has died at age 66.

items.title: The 125 points allowed by Los Angeles are the most ever allowed in franchise history. The 20 made 3s by Toronto are the second-most in league history. The Sparks gave up 22 to Las Vegas in the season finale last year.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The 125 points allowed by Los Angeles are the most ever allowed in franchise history. The 20 made 3s by Toronto are the second-most in league history. The Sparks gave up 22 to Las Vegas in the season finale last year.

items.title: Final: Tempo 125, Sparks 97. Marina Mabrey tied a WNBA record with 53 points and 9 3-pointers. Los Angeles had zero answers for Toronto on the defensive end. Defensively, obviously, was the problem. Sparks fall to 8-9. They play at Indiana on Saturday.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Tempo 125, Sparks 97. Marina Mabrey tied a WNBA record with 53 points and 9 3-pointers. Los Angeles had zero answers for Toronto on the defensive end. Defensively, obviously, was the problem. Sparks fall to 8-9. They play at Indiana on Saturday.

items.title: This is a really great moment for an expansion team. It's more than a win. Mabrey's performance will draw so much earned media/attention/promotion for @tempobasketball.bsky.social.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
This is a really great moment for an expansion team. It's more than a win. Mabrey's performance will draw so much earned media/attention/promotion for @tempobasketball.bsky.social.
.

items.title: Sparks trail Tempo 95-66 after three. The 95 points by Toronto are the most scored through three quarters by a WNBA team since 2010. It’s the most allowed in Los Angeles Sparks history through three quarters in any game. Marina Mabrey has scored 39 for Toronto.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks trail Tempo 95-66 after three. The 95 points by Toronto are the most scored through three quarters by a WNBA team since 2010. It’s the most allowed in Los Angeles Sparks history through three quarters in any game. Marina Mabrey has scored 39 for Toronto.

items.title: The Tempo scored a whopping 95 points through three quarters of play against the Sparks. LA now trails by 29 entering the fourth.

items.title: Marina Mabrey has a career-high 39 points. She has been in a zone few shooters can ever hope to get to. Sparks trail 87-53. Mabrey has made 7 3s. There’s still 3 minutes to go in the third quarter.

items.title: Just under $13M AAV for Mark Williams is fair value. Good business for him and the Suns - not a super long or expensive deal to stunt Khaman Maluach’s growth, but also locks in their best option to start at C next season. 15 players under contract now including Bouyea/Highsmith
